list.title: Job postings
list.description: Manage your saved job postings and create applications from them.

input.title: Add new job posting
input.description: Add a URL or copy the text to save the job.

empty.title: No job postings
empty.description: You have not saved any job postings yet. Add your first job to get started.

step1.title: 1 · Save job
step1.description: Add a URL from LinkedIn/Indeed or copy the posting text.

step2.title: 2 · Analyze
step2.description: Our AI automatically extracts all important requirements and skills.

step3.title: 3 · Apply
step3.description: Create a tailored application for this job with one click.

deleteDialog.title: Delete job posting?
deleteDialog.description: Do you really want to delete the job posting {title}?

notFound.title: Job posting not found
notFound.description: The requested job posting does not exist or you do not have permission.
